_comment: COMMIT-SAFE, ORIGINAL Hearthvale style constraints for generating our OWN assets that
sit comfortably next to the LimeZu-led look WITHOUT copying LimeZu art. These are
abstract production rules (sizes, outline px, padding, shadow/highlight direction,
palette intent) learned from the production CONSTRAINTS of cozy pixel art — not pixels
lifted from any pack. The palette below is a Hearthvale-original cozy set, not a copy of
LimeZu's palette. tools/art/hearthvale_palette_analyzer.py writes measured stats to a
LOCAL gitignored report; this committed profile is what the generators actually read.

pixel_scale.rule: Author at base_cell_px, upscale by an INTEGER factor with NEAREST. Never non-integer scale pixel art.

icons.rule: Item/resource icons are a centred silhouette inside a 16px cell with >=1px transparent padding so they never touch a slot frame.

outline.rule: 1px outline, darker than the local fill (not pure black); outlines may be omitted on internal seams.

shadow.rule: Light comes from top; cast a soft 1px-down shadow. Bottom-anchored props get a small contact ellipse.

highlight.rule: Highlights on top/top-left facing surfaces; shading on bottom/bottom-right.

value_saturation.rule: Avoid pure black/white and fully saturated primaries; keep a warm, slightly desaturated cozy range.

palette._note: Hearthvale-ORIGINAL cozy palette (hand-authored, not copied). Hues chosen to be compatible with a warm farm/village look.

ui_spacing.rule: Match the live LimezuUITheme margins so generated UI bits drop into the same frames cleanly.

naming.rule: lowercase snake_case; cell size suffix; no spaces.

export.policy: Generated originals stay local/gitignored until docs/hearthvale_asset_generator_plan.md declares a commit policy. Never co-mingle with LimeZu licensed art.
